title: Too Many Maces
description: Maces that shouldn't be in Minecraft.
body:
This mod adds new maces to Minecraft since Minecraft's mace pretty much sucks.

Here's a few examples (note that all effects are triggered with the smash attack):
- Gravity Mace
  - Makes all entities hit levitates
- Lightning Mace
  - Like Thor's hammer, just try not to hit yourself with lightning
- Isolation Mace
  - The AoE is a lot bigger with a lot more knockback. Marks the target with glowing, weakness and slowness. However does not deal additional damamge based on distance fall.
- Ice Mace
  - Freezes all entities hit
- Impact Mace
  - Bring anime fights to Minecraft with the impact mace. Keep away from your builds as they will be hurt.
- Obsidian Mace
  - A craftable mace


Some potions are also added:
- Antigravity
  - Players won't be able to jump nor fall. 
- Mace Core
  - Higher jump boost for more engaging mace combat


Maces are obtainable in survival.
More maces will be added.
